---
title: range-val-in-closure
description: "Avoid capturing range values in closures."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Avoid capturing range values in closures. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
for _, value := range values { use(func() { print(value) }) }
```

## Good

```go
for _, value := range values { use(func(current int) func() { return func() { print(current) } }(value)) }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only range-val-in-closure`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
